incorrects.description: Student placed incorrect tiles on first attempt

steps.text: Not quite. Look at the array. How many rows do you see?

incorrects.description: Student placed incorrect tiles on second attempt

params.description: Each row pulses to highlight the row structure.

steps.text: Let's think about this together. Count the rows: 2 rows. Count the dots in one row: 5 dots. So it's 2 times 5.

incorrects.description: Student placed incorrect tiles three or more times. System models the answer.

params.description: First row highlights, then second row highlights, showing 2 rows total.
System places 2 in first slot, then 5 in second slot.

steps.text: Let me show you how this works. I count the rows: 2 rows. I count how many dots are in each row: 5 dots. So the expression is 2 times 5. That tells us there are 2 rows of 5.
